name: Tonight
detailedForecast: Rain showers likely before 8pm, then patchy fog and showers and thunderstorms between 8pm and 10pm, then patchy fog and a chance of showers and thunderstorms between 10pm and 11pm, then patchy fog and showers and thunderstorms likely between 11pm and 2am, then patchy fog and showers and thunderstorms. Cloudy, with a low around 62. Southeast wind around 8 mph. Chance of precipitation is 90%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.
